description_long: This is a large, modern commercial jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a pair of long, swept-back wings mounted low on the body. The wings feature upward-angled winglets at their tips, enhancing aerodynamic efficiency. Two sizable turbofan engines are mounted beneath the wings, one on each side, and the landing gear is visible in a tricycle configuration with two main gear units and a nose gear. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The cockpit is positioned at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows indicating a multi-seat, enclosed design.
description: A large, modern jet airplane with swept-back low wings, underwing turbofan engines, and a conventional tail. The fuselage is streamlined with a forward, multi-window cockpit and visible tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose, cockpit windows, symmetrical low-mounted wings with winglets, and both underwing engines.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the elongated fuselage, left wing with winglet, left engine, and the conventional tail structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, both horizontal stabilizers, vertical stabilizer, and the trailing edges of the wings and engines.
description_view_3: Right side profile showing the right wing with winglet, right engine, and the full length of the fuselage and tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with long, swept-back wings and upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turbofan underwing engines, one on each side.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, indicating a multi-seat configuration.
